case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. FRANCISCO OVIDIO CORNEJO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-29-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, MARICRUZ CEDANO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FRANCISCO OVIDIO CORNEJO. PROOF OF SERVICE IN FILE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST AT OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FRANCISCO OVIDIO CORNEJO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED (D506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,402.29 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT CORNEJO, FRANCISCO OVIDIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORNEJO, FRANCISCO OVIDIO $1,252.29 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,397.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $45.00 SERVED MAY-12-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CORNEJO, FRANCISCO OVIDIO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CORNEJO, FRANCISCO OVIDIO
